exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your job search forward
items: Complete a comprehensive skills inventory by listing all your technical, soft, and industry-specific skills with 1-2 concrete examples for each
Research and document 5-10 companies in your target industry, including their values, recent news, and specific departments that align with your career goals
Create a clear career objective statement that defines your target role, industry, and 2-3 key value propositions you bring to employers
Set up and optimize your LinkedIn profile with a professional photo, compelling headline, detailed experience descriptions, and at least 50 connections in your target industry
Conduct informational interviews with 3 professionals currently working in your target role or company to understand daily responsibilities, career paths, and industry insights
Analyze 10-15 job postings in your target role to identify the most frequently mentioned skills, qualifications, and keywords for your resume optimization
